'''Vered''' was a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] on the [[Council of Moffs/Legends|Council of Moffs]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. He met with the other council members on [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]] to discuss [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon's]] proposed [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|peace treaty]] with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

{{Char-stub}}
